details.message:
:red_circle: *PatchNoz incident* | `demo-checkout-payment`
*Alert:* Checkout latency spike  |  *Severity:* `critical`

*Investigation halted: Cannot connect to SigNoz at http://localhost:8082. Received HTTP 404.*

*Evidence:*
  • Affected service: `checkout` — p99 `0ms`
  • Root cause service: `unknown` — error rate `0.0%`
  • Affected pattern: `unknown`

*Error observed:*
```Could not connect to SigNoz at http://localhost:8082. Received HTTP Error 404: Not Found during login attempt.```

*Confidence:* ░░░░░░░░░░ 0%
_Unable to connect to SigNoz instance at http://localhost:8082. Received "HTTP Error 404: Not Found" when attempting to list services. Cannot gather any monitoring data to investigate the alert._

*Recommended fix:*
  1. Verify the SigNoz base URL is correct and the instance is running.
  2. Check network connectivity to the SigNoz instance.
  3. Ensure SigNoz API is accessible and authentication details are valid.

*SigNoz links:*
  • <http://localhost:8082/services/checkout|services › checkout>

details.title: [PatchNoz] checkout: Checkout latency spike (root cause: unknown)
